body_txt: A literal-minded person just doesn't get figurative speech , instead interpreting instructions, idioms, expressions, wordplays, metaphors and similes , understatements , sarcasm , etc. completely literally. Some of the ways this trope is played:  Characters who have this as a primary characteristic will occasionally be The Comically Serious . Compare Literal Metaphor , Shaped Like Itself , Fun with Homophones , Double Meaning . Frequently results in Comically Missing the Point . This trope does not mean tropes being taken literally, contrary to popular belief.        The Amazing Digital Circus Animorphs Calvin and Hobbes Crossover Disney Animated Canon Godzilla The Hunger Games Invader Zim Lucky Star Marvel Cinematic Universe My Little Pony Neon Genesis Evangelion Once Upon a Time (2011) The Owl House Pokémon RWBY Sonic the Hedgehog Sword Art Online Whoniverse Unsorted
